pcs.name: Caspian Talus Dryce
pcs.role: Researcher Prime · Framed Heretic · Secret Child of the Flame (5 years)
facts: Tattooed bronze toolkit in his own skin — functional thieves' tools
Gray smoke, between fingers. Stops reflecting light. Defer damage 1/day.
Two Null Sigils (broken by {mara}); healed by {marisha}
pcs.body:
A Researcher Prime of the Ministry who was maneuvered into sounding heretical at the Beacon Ignition so his patents could be seized by {aurelian}. He joined {flame} five years ago out of curiosity, not devotion — "I've been knocking on every door." Branded with two Null Sigils, exiled on {penance}, now free to cast again.

He thinks in systems. Even bound on the bench of a prison ship he read {castrell}'s surface thoughts while finishing lockpicks from tattoo-ink tools. He has revealed himself to {zaren} as {flame}. His shield channels preserving energy through his familiar — a mechanism he doesn't yet understand.

pcs.name: Zaren Dryce
pcs.role: Marshal of the Guilded Guard · Winged Watch façade · deep-cover Children of the Flame
pcs.class: Paladin / officer · 55, scarred, cheek & forehead tattoos
facts: {flame} — embedded to hunt his own, save martyrs
Purple coin, shin. +10kg heavy feel. Move-resist advantage; auto-fail Acrobatics.
Wife, daughter (~10, receiving her {feastofnails}), elderly parents
In Cavern of Sorrow; revealed his mark to {mervel}
pcs.body:
Fifty-five. Veteran enforcer. His inner sanctum at the {dryce} estate is three feet of metal-lined stone built by {vein}. For years he has hunted his own brotherhood while feeding intel back to it — "They are martyrs. They understand."

He was handed the {penance} escort by {mccord} and ordered by {vein} to sabotage it. He refused the sabotage but kept the prisms. On the shore, in a coded exchange, {mara} placed him: "the tide is coming" / "but the seal will hold." His Unbroken-raid memory returned: {unbroken} children reciting the Fifth Nail. In the Cavern he pressed ash to his mark and the cave answered.

pcs.name: Alex Talus
pcs.role: Ministry-certified crystal monitor · Researcher · House Talus blood sacrifice
facts: Black needle ring on right ear. Hide in dim light.
Spider · plus a black cat with silver eyes from the dead shore
A childlike voice inside her mind since {silver} spoke about family
pcs.body:
Conscripted at the foyer as {mccord} cornered her father: a flaw was detected, the Ministry needed a Talus monitor, the choice was not a choice. Her father called it privately "a blood sacrifice to prove the family is still in line" and told her: "Stick close to {zaren}. He will protect you."

She returned from the shore with blood on her face; {caspian} returned clean. She hasn't explained. She doesn't trust {zaren} yet and was caught by {silver} trying to search {mara}'s tent. Her stated goal widened from "go home" to "understand Vastraya — what happens here is tied to what happened there."

pcs.name: Lysandra Vermont
pcs.role: House Vermont heir · framed for Grand Larceny · crystal-cutter
facts: {vermont} — occupied by {aurelian}; siblings are prisoners in their own home
Made a bargain in a dark place with "a king who wore no crown" — "invited the light to sit where his heart used to be"
A baby voice: "Mother, don't believe her." First heard at bonding.
Plains of fire · teenage daughter with gemstone eyes · four nails through heart
pcs.body:
Arrested three days before Ascension Day on forged crystal charges — the {vermontfacet} appeared on depleted boxes she never saw. Her mother smuggled her jeweler's tools into the {dampeningchamber} and revealed the Vermont inheritance: before Lysandra was born, her father met a king, and light came to sit where his heart had been. A burden.

Her cutting is not craft alone. When she works, the material responds — something in her resonates with the crystal. {caspian} has started prodding at it. Inside her, a child's voice speaks; in her vision, the child calls her "Mother." Four nails, through the heart.
relationships: heard her voice in the chamber

npcs.name: Julius Mccord
facts: "The Empire is breathing, Marshal. Do not let it choke on your watch."
npcs.body: Handpicked {zaren} to escort the {penance}. Cornered Gerald Talus over 74% contracts to extract {alex}. Stripped {caspian} and {lysandra} of their names and sentenced them to Vastraya. Whispered to a hidden figure in the {dampeningchamber} before sentencing — identity never explained.

npcs.name: Asmodeus Vein
facts: Zaren's metal-lined sanctum (15 yrs ago) · the {dampeningchamber}
"The flame will not drown." (greeting and farewell both)
npcs.body: Already inside the sanctum when {zaren} returned — had never announced himself. Delivered the {flame}'s demand to sabotage the {penance}; provided a {discdevice} and two prisms. Said: "The tide is coming in. And it's carrying salt this time."

npcs.name: Lady Vermont
facts: House occupied; not allowed to speak the name Vermont aloud
Revealed Vermont inheritance — father met a king in a dark place
npcs.body: Entered the {dampeningchamber} in mourning black with a High Templar escort. Smuggled in Lysandra's jeweler's tools. Then the inheritance — the light that sits where the heart used to be, a king who wore no crown, a burden. She cannot come back.

npcs.name: Mara of the Iron Will
facts: Survived an ambush by a Hulking Refracted 10 yrs ago by running; her platoon died
Removed three from the {familypost}; carries two dead companions' nails
npcs.body:
Found the party on the shore at 5 HP and still performed {glassbonding} on all four. Corrupted the Prayer of Ignition while breaking {caspian}'s Null Sigils. Took his mint shard for herself — "This one is for me."

Coded exchange with {zaren}: "the tide is coming" / "the seal will hold." Broke at the sound of the Hulking Refracted and fled weeping, repeating "By the Four Nails." Tries to end the {hollow} bodies every day — mercy and killing are neighboring ideas to her.

npcs.name: Elder Vorn
facts: Purple crystal embedded in chest · names of the dead written across his skin (80+)
{solarcalcination} is getting less efficient on purpose — a Tier 1 now needs Tier 2 output
npcs.body:
Reported the discrepancy to his superior. Went drinking to celebrate. Came home to smoke, wife and children dead, himself erased from census, marriage, schools. "They did not want to kill me. They wanted to make sure I never happened."

Set up the encampment 30 years ago. Only permanent resident. Strikes his staff/cane to chest and casts "Peace" — party becomes magically frightened, cannot take hostile action for 1 minute.

npcs.name: Marisha
facts: Respiratory system replaced by {vitreum}. Doesn't eat, sleep, breathe.
Healed Caspian's hand; midwifed {silver} from his dying mother
npcs.body: Stripped of rank, branded a traitor, exiled for exposing the {ghostwards}. Her body has been replaced piece by piece; she is "on her way out" and irreversible. Uses glass as a magical material component in surgery.

npcs.name: Silver
npcs.role: Child of the encampment · six-shard bonded
facts: Three black + three yellow — compatible pair
Glass veins visible under skin; Vorn gives him ~1 year
The party's private {flame} conversation: "Information is power."
"Sometimes I hear whispers beneath the ground. They say it's this way." → {valleyazar}
npcs.body: Born with a yellow shard inside him — {marisha} delivered him as his dying mother arrived on the shore. He identifies as {wingedwatch} (the sentry), even though {mara} is {ironwill}. Teleports. Caught {alex} trying to enter {mara}'s room: "I can go anywhere. I am the sentry."

npcs.name: Charcy
npcs.role: Camp trader · field taxonomist of shards
facts: Crystals — to tinker, ideally to build something permanent
The statue in camp is a construct (has joints)
1 large Hulk crystal = 4 pairs gloves; 1 crystal = 1 {hydropurifier} canteen
npcs.body: Lively, sharp, treats every exchange like a market. The only person who tracks shard behavior as a practical taxonomy. Pointed the party at the {construct} and the {rod}.

npcs.name: Sovereign Cyr
npcs.role: Ancient voice in the hidden shore chamber
npcs.body:
Voice in the chamber opened by {caspian}'s golden tattoo: "We were not their hands. We were their chains. They gave us steel to kill a king so they could wear his crown. She made sure the weaver's hands went still."

"The heavens are empty not by chance but by design. Vajran burst his skin. Arcanon stopped the world from drifting. Kaelanor poured his blood into the soil. And I stood between you and the sun of a dying heart." Fragments: jailer · infinite · every · burned. Then silence.

npcs.name: Mervel Haloval
npcs.role: Presides over the drowning rite at the {cavernsorrow}
facts: Tortured at {sarn} — raw glass hammered into hips, spine, throat
Two purple markings, arms — matching the cave walls
"Just another actor on a stage made of corpses."
npcs.body: Hold Mount-born noble. Presides over the ritual drowning in the {cavernsorrow}. Her resonance leaks; Silver says "she isn't doing it on purpose." Challenged {zaren}: "How about you enlighten us in the water with the tide?" His answer: "the water, the suffocation is only one thing. It is by the ashes that everything reveals."

npcs.name: Captain Castrell
facts: "The land of the law is three days behind us."
npcs.body: Drunk, unkempt, civilian-sailor look. Papers proved him captain. Operating on secret orders against his crew. Said to Caspian: "They give you the special treatment. Never seen one with two."

npcs.name: Auditor Dominus
facts: A figurehead politician; Zaren claims he is {flame}
npcs.body: {caspian} believes Dominus betrayed him. {zaren} claims Dominus is also {flame}. Both cannot be fully true without a deeper layer.

npcs.name: General Mosh
npcs.body: Per Zaren: General Mosh is also a {flame}. No further confirmation.

npcs.name: Gerald Talus
facts: 74% of House Talus holdings are on Ministry contracts
npcs.body: Broke under {mccord}'s pressure and forced {alex} aboard the {penance} as "a blood sacrifice to prove the family is still in line."

npcs.name: Aria Talus
npcs.body: Broke the news of {caspian}'s arrest and erasure at the start of {alex}'s arc.

npcs.name: Halia
npcs.body: Tried to minimize {caspian}'s fate. "Caspian isn't really part of the family anyway."

npcs.name: Azazel
npcs.role: One of Zaren's guards in the Unbroken-raid memory
npcs.body: Named in Zaren's memory of raiding an {unbroken} family home.

places.name: Solaris
facts: "Screams with the high-frequency hum of aether crystals"
places.body: The party's city of origin for {zaren} and the {dryce}. At Ascension, the city's crystals hum the processions up to noon. Behind three feet of metal-lined stone, Zaren's sanctum holds an artificial silence.

places.name: Cyritium
facts: The Ministry, Gala of the First Crown
places.body: The seat of the Ministry. The {dampeningchamber} lies below the {highspire}. The {penance} departs from its docks.

places.name: Cyriath
facts: Construct workshop is north of here, in {argenta}
places.body: The city whose construct workshop built the closed-patent constructs Caspian has disassembled before. Their mechanism is similar to the encampment's statue — but that one is older, cruder, and has no visible power core.

places.name: Vastraya
facts: None — no vegetation, fauna, birds, animals, fish
Tinnitus = "the scream of the land"; bone-deep ache; converts bodies to {hollow}
places.body: A dead land hungry to bond with mortal blood. Prolonged exposure turns the body brittle, the mind to static. Without {glassbonding} you become {hollow} or {refracted}. The land is not primitive — it is betrayed.

places.name: Hold Mount
places.body: The encampment. A wall, a central post, the nameless construct at its heart. The lifeline of everyone Vorn has taken in.

places.name: Cavern of Sorrow
facts: Narrow jagged crack; waterline at chest height
Tide-drowned ritual space · purple finger-drawn markings · marks brighten to touch
places.body: Where {mervel} presides. Followers mark their furthest point inward in purple pigment. The tide fills the cavern and the drowning is part of the rite — not punishment, but threshold. Revelation is "by the ashes."

places.name: Sarn
places.body: Where exiles are processed and held. Where Mervel was strapped to an obsidian rack and had glass hammered into her body.

places.name: The Dampening Chamber
places.body: The cell where {lysandra} and {caspian} met. Built by House Vein. Air reeks of chlorine; the {highspire}'s hum carries even here.

places.name: The High Spire
places.body: Its aether crystals are enormous; their hum carries underground to the {dampeningchamber}.

places.name: Exvald's Ridge
places.body: A work camp — effectively where exiles were supposed to be taken. Built in part by {mara}'s old Cyriath Vanguard platoon.

places.name: Broken Teeth Peaks
places.body: Where an Auditor is rumored to be hiding — unknown whether from the {ebonylegions}, or brokering safe passage.

places.name: Valley of Azar
places.body: {silver} hears whispers from beneath the ground pointing toward it — likely tied to {azar} the primordial.

places.name: Elevand Crossing
places.body: The bridge north of {holdmount}. Route to the {cavernsorrow}.

places.name: Ghost Wards
places.body: Secret military hospitals where the terminally ill, critically wounded, and "inconvenient" are quietly processed and shipped to {vastraya}. Discovered by {marisha}.

places.name: Dryce Estate
places.body: Zaren's innermost sanctum — three feet of metal-lined stone, built by {vein}, silent amid the city's crystal hum.

places.name: Talus Estate
places.body: Where Gerald Talus broke and forced {alex} aboard {penance}.

places.name: Vermont Estate
places.body: Occupied. Lysandra's siblings are prisoners in their own home; the name cannot be spoken aloud.

places.name: The Broken Anchor
places.body: A tavern referenced in session play.

factions.name: Ministry of Sanctity / Sanctification
factions.body: The imperial arm that brands heretics, operates {sarn} and the {ghostwards}, and maintains the High Spires. Holds 74% of {talus}'s contracts.

factions.name: Office of Holy Order
factions.body: Where Zaren was ordered to report at first light.

factions.name: Templar's Office
factions.body: Does not care about calendar convenience even on Ascension Day.

factions.name: Guilded Guard
factions.body: {zaren}'s service. Tasked him with hunting {flame}.

factions.name: Ebony Legions
factions.body: Imperial army. {mara} served in its {cyriathvanguard}. {mosh} leads them.

factions.name: Cyriath Vanguard
factions.body: Elite unit within the Ebony Legions. {marisha} served here as a medic. {mara} deployed to {vastraya} with the Ebony Legions 10 years ago — whether specifically with the Vanguard is unconfirmed.

factions.name: Children of the Flame
factions.body: A faith declared terrorist by the empire. Believes the world has a true Father, unjustly struck down, who will return. {zaren} is deep cover. {caspian} joined out of curiosity. {mervel} follows a variant. {dominus} and {mosh}, per Zaren, are also aligned.

factions.name: Church of the Sovereign Scars
factions.body: Venerates {seraphex}, {arcanon}, {kaelanor}, {vajran} — each tied to a Quadrant path. The {cyr} reveal recasts the Sovereigns as chains, not hands.

factions.name: Winged Watch
factions.body: Sentries and scholars. {zaren}'s visible path. {silver} identifies as one.

factions.name: Order of the Steel Grip
factions.body: Builders, masons, archivists. Believes the world must be physically held together. {vorn}'s path.

factions.name: Iron Hand
factions.body: Healers and farmers. {marisha}'s path.

factions.name: Iron Will
factions.body: Scouts, hunters, survivalists. {mara}'s path.

factions.name: The Brotherhood
factions.body: The cell structure around {flame}. {vein} operates within it.

factions.name: The Unbroken
factions.body: Radical faction venerating the Sovereigns. Litany: "Four to lock. One to break. Four were given. The fifth we take." Holds that the Sovereigns wanted the world free of both primordials and celestials, and "pain is the proof of life."

factions.name: House Talus
factions.body: 74% of holdings on Ministry contracts. Precision reagents, alchemy, maintenance of the {highspire}'s glow. Sacrificed {alex} to stay in favor.

factions.name: House Dryce
factions.body: Zaren's family — fractured across {solaris}.

factions.name: House Vermont
factions.body: Known for efficient crystal use and the {vermontfacet}. Occupied by {aurelian}; the name cannot be spoken aloud.

factions.name: House Vein
factions.body: Built the {dampeningchamber}, Zaren's sanctum, and more.

factions.name: House Aurelian
factions.body: Seized {caspian}'s patents. Occupied the {vermontestate} and siphoned its legacy. A minor house, but an ambitious one.

factions.name: House Castrell
factions.body: Supplied five navigators for the {penance}. {castrell} was their captain.

items.name: The Silent Scream
items.body: Embedded in her arm. Proficiency: Insight, Perception. Max HP −5, disadvantage on Con saves vs. poison & disease.

items.name: Gray-smoke shard
items.body: Between his fingers. Stops reflecting light. Defer damage 1/day. Max HP −5.

items.name: Purple coin shard
items.body: Round like a coin, purple smoke inside. In his shin. +10kg weight feel; forced-movement disadvantage; auto-fail Acrobatics. Max HP −5.

items.name: Black needle shard
items.body: Threaded through her right ear into a ring. Hide more effectively in dim light / darkness. Max HP −5.

items.name: Ring of Echoes
items.body: +1 spell attack · +1 spell save DC · Cast {command} twice per day.

items.name: Shield of the Quadrant
items.body: Grants the cantrip Spare the Dying. Caspian's; channels preserving energy through his familiar.

items.name: The Penance
items.body: No sails — aether crystals installed directly into the mast, above and below deck. Three massive wooden crates in the hold, delivered by three individuals and an auditor in a silver mask — never explained. Exploded en route to {vastraya}.

items.name: Disc + Two Prisms
items.body: {vein} gave these to Zaren — drain any aether crystal's charge in minutes. Zaren kept the prisms "just in case."

items.name: The Construct (Hold Mount statue)
items.body: An ancient automaton, older and cruder than Cyriath-patent workshop constructs. Once dormant at Hold Mount, it was successfully awakened and now travels with the party as an ally. It still carries the old signatures of gears, pistons, and plated housing rather than a neat visible core, it suppresses the {static}, and it responds specifically to the {rod}.
facts: Awakened. Travels with the party as an ally.
Ancient automaton that can suppress the {static} and answer to the {rod}.

items.name: The Strange Metal Rod
items.body: Liquid inside. Feels anti-magical — like something that interferes with or drains magical effects. The {construct} grips it when placed in its hand and is more responsive afterward.

items.name: Null Sigil Cuffs
items.body: Brand magic off the hands. Caspian wore two — exceptional threat flag. Mara broke them by driving a 30cm iron spike through his palms, reciting a corrupted Prayer of Ignition.

items.name: Hydro Purifier Canteen
items.body: Uses a shard in its base to purify water. 1 Hulk crystal per canteen at {charcy}'s rates.

items.name: Healer Kit
items.body: 2 crystals for 2 kits at {charcy}'s rates.

items.name: Glass gloves
items.body: Essential for handling shards; touching bare-handed = bonding whether you want it or not. 1 Hulk crystal = 4 pairs.

items.name: Capture Lance
items.body: Used in {zaren}'s Unbroken-raid memory to seize a child.

items.name: Bronze tattoo lockpicks
items.body: Thieves' tools tattooed into his skin in bronze ink — the pieces interlock into functional tools when scraped and assembled. Disguised as a golden tattoo.

items.name: Jeweler's tools
items.body: {vermontmother} smuggled them into the {dampeningchamber}.

items.name: Caspian's Golden Tattoo
items.body: Opened the {cyr} chamber when pressed to the eye rune. Channels light.

items.name: Broken revolver
items.body: Salvaged on the shore.

items.name: Climber's kit
items.body: Charcy recommends before inland travel.

items.name: Scrap armor
items.body: Steep prices at camp.

terms.name: Aether crystal
terms.body: The energy economy of the empire. Powers ships, the High Spires, the festivals of the capital. {vorn} discovered its output efficiency is being throttled on purpose.

terms.name: Aether
terms.body: Divine energy; stored ritually in crystals using the {prayerignition}.

terms.name: Solar calcination
terms.body: The process that prepares aether crystals. It is becoming less efficient on purpose — a Tier 1 now requires Tier 2 output. By design, not accident.

terms.name: Glass bonding
terms.body: The only protection against {vastraya}'s pull. A shard is driven into flesh; blood grips it, the shard settles, the body pays with −5 max HP and vulnerability to poison & disease.

terms.name: Refracted
terms.body: Exiles overtaken by glass — shards protruding from dead-looking bodies. Still "people, in a sense." {mara} hates them; she is terrified of the Hulking variant.

terms.name: Hollow
terms.body: Exiles overtaken by the smog. Blue-skinned, breathing, but no longer awake. Kept around the {construct}; they crawl back toward it if moved.

terms.name: Crystallized Siren
terms.body: A Refracted one step above. {mervel} is one. Said to "leak" resonance without meaning to.

terms.name: Hulking Refracted
terms.body: Massive glass creature. Crystals are the weak point. Radiant damage hits harder than blunt. Rare — only the third in Vorn's 30 years.

terms.name: Vermont Facet
terms.body: The distinctive cut that never flickers — supposedly because Lysandra's father made a bargain in a dark place, with "a king who wore no crown."

terms.name: Silver thread
terms.body: "Four lands were bound with a silver thread. Four crowns were taken to this island bed." The binding-phrase of the Sovereigns.

terms.name: The Four Crowns / Four Lands
terms.body: Referenced on the stone door opened by Caspian.

terms.name: Feast of the Nails
terms.body: Annual Quadrant holy day of communal labor. Initiation rite: children drive an iron nail into the family post. Nails mark belonging, shame, death. Mara removed three from the {holdmount} post and carries two dead companions' nails.

terms.name: Family post
terms.body: Each household has one. {holdmount} uses the central post like a family post. Nails can be added — and removed.

terms.name: The Litany of the Fifth Nail
terms.body: "Four to lock. One to break. Four were given. The fifth we take." — Unbroken doctrine.

terms.name: Ascension Day / Festival
terms.body: Imperial holy day; processions at high noon. The board was already moving three days before.

terms.name: Prayer of Ignition
terms.body: Part of the {songresonance}. Releases aether from a crystal into a target. Mara recited a corrupted version while breaking Caspian's sigils.

terms.name: Song of Resonance
terms.body: Caspian's faith tradition — the larger hymn framework that contains the {prayerignition}.

terms.name: Vitreum
terms.body: The shard type {marisha} embedded in her chest to replace her respiratory system.

terms.name: Ignis shard (orange)
terms.body: Charcy's name for the orange shard type. Gives warmth.

terms.name: Mantis / Whisper shard (yellow)
terms.body: Charcy's name. Vibrates inside the head.

terms.name: Gravitas / Anchor shard (purple-gray)
terms.body: Charcy's name. Heavy, grounding, anchoring. {zaren}'s shard type.

terms.name: The static
terms.body: The land's mental interference — tinnitus, bone-deep ache. Glass bonding slows it; the {construct} suppresses it entirely nearby.

terms.name: Null Sigil
terms.body: Brand that nullifies magic. One is already severe. Two = exceptional threat flag.

terms.name: Azar
terms.body: The primordial threat the Sovereigns allegedly defeated. The {valleyazar} may connect to it.

terms.name: Seraphex
terms.body: Sovereign of the {wingedwatch}.

terms.name: Arcanon
terms.body: Sovereign of the {steelgrid}. Per {cyr}: "Arcanon stopped the world from drifting."

terms.name: Kaelanor
terms.body: Sovereign of the {ironhand}. Per {cyr}: "Kaelanor poured his blood into the soil."

terms.name: Vajran
terms.body: Sovereign of the {ironwill}. Per {cyr}: "Vajran burst his skin."

terms.name: Command
terms.body: The {ringofechoes} grants two castings per day.

terms.name: Radiant Law
terms.body: The state religion following three celestials: Lunaria, Solaria, Elidria.

hooks.title: Drop Mervel — or convert her
hooks.body: Combat in the {cavernsorrow} has begun. She has two marks and "maybe waits for a third." Her followers have bowed to {zaren}. If she dies the camp pressure on {holdmount} drops; if she yields, the cave's rite may be redirected.

hooks.title: Who is strangling the crystal economy?
hooks.body: {vorn}'s evidence: {solarcalcination} is being throttled on purpose. {aurelian} took {caspian}'s efficiency patents. {vermont} were famous for making crystal use more efficient. These threads intersect.

hooks.title: "Nail pulled from the door."
hooks.body: {cyr}'s last words before silence. The system of divine imprisonment — the Sovereigns as chains — may already be failing. The {fifthnail} litany may be operational doctrine now.

hooks.title: Can the party trust Zaren?
hooks.body: {alex} does not. {caspian} has chosen to. Zaren's "rescue" plan was in motion before the ship exploded — he claims. Why was {caspian} worth rescuing specifically?

hooks.title: Awaken the {construct}
hooks.body: Resolved. The construct was successfully awakened, ceased being a dormant Hold Mount mystery, and joined the party as an allied automaton.

hooks.title: The hiding Auditor in the Broken Teeth Peaks
hooks.body: {vorn}'s rumor. Hiding from the {ebonylegions}? Brokering safe passage? Being traded for it? No one knows which.

hooks.title: Silver's whispers beneath the {valleyazar}
hooks.body: {silver}: "Sometimes I hear whispers from beneath the ground. They say it's this way. I'll take you there." The voices are tied directly to the {valleyazar} lead, not just to Silver as a curiosity.

hooks.title: What is really happening in {sarn}?
hooks.body: The party explicitly names investigating {sarn} as part of the broader goal of understanding what is happening in {vastraya}. {mervel}'s torture there, the processing of exiles, and the Ministry's experiments make it a major unresolved lead.

hooks.title: What is {exvaldsridge} really for?
hooks.body: {mara} says exiles like the party were most likely supposed to be taken to {exvaldsridge}, a work camp her old platoon helped build. {mervel} implied there is more to it, and even Hold Mount scavengers avoid the area because of patrols.

hooks.title: Follow the lead toward the {valleyazar}
hooks.body: The {valleyazar} is repeatedly surfaced as a major future lead. {silver}'s underground whispers point there, and the name itself suggests a connection to {azar} that may sit underneath the land's deeper truth.

hooks.title: Find a way back to {cyriath}
hooks.body: {vorn} says there is one, though he has never heard of anyone doing it. He may provide directions in exchange for something.

hooks.title: The three crates on the Penance
hooks.body: Delivered by three individuals and a silver-masked auditor — all gone before departure. The Brotherhood believed one held something "foundational" that could crack the high houses. Never found.

hooks.title: Lysandra's father and the king without a crown
hooks.body: "He invited the light to sit where his heart used to be." {zaren} suspects he didn't die the way Lysandra was told.

hooks.title: The child voice inside Lysandra
hooks.body: "Mother, don't believe her." First heard at bonding. In her vision, a teenage girl with gemstone eyes calls her Mother. Four nails through the heart.

hooks.title: The childlike voice in Alex
hooks.body: "I like this one." Heard when {silver} spoke about family being more than blood. Not her spider familiar. Something else.

hooks.title: The hidden figure at sentencing
hooks.body: {mccord} whispered to a hidden figure in one of the {dampeningchamber} cages before sentencing. The guards wore that figure's uniform. Never explained.

hooks.title: The black cat with silver eyes
hooks.body: Came back from the shore with {lysandra} in a land that has no animal life. Morphed briefly into a yellow-skinned toddler. {mara} was confused but unafraid.

hooks.title: Why did Lysandra return bloody and Caspian clean?
hooks.body: Off-screen on the shore scavenging run. Never explained. {caspian} has not said what happened.

hooks.title: Survive the shore (via {glassbonding})
hooks.body: All four bonded under {mara}. The cost: −5 max HP each, disadvantage on Con saves vs poison/disease.

hooks.title: Drop the Refracted Hulk at Hold Mount
hooks.body: Party won. Reached level 6. Earned access to the camp and {vorn}.

hooks.title: Open the Chamber of Cyr
hooks.body: {goldenTattoo} unlocked the door; Sovereign Cyr's reveal; stone guardians defeated.

hooks.title: Identify Lysandra's ring
hooks.body: {caspian} identified the {ringofechoes}.

hooks.title: Break Caspian's Null Sigils
hooks.body: {mara} drove a 30cm iron spike through both hands. Caspian's magic returned.
